[30;1m531 | [0m[35m### `<UISref>`[0m
[30;1m532 | [0m[35mThis component binds its child component to a state.[0m
[30;1m533 | [0m[35mIf the state has an associated URL, it will automatically generate and update the `href`.[0m
[30;1m534 | [0m[35mClicking the child component will trigger a state transition with optional parameters.[0m
[30;1m535 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m536 | [0m[35m```jsx[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m433[0m[34m of [0m[33m498[0m[31m ]--[0m
